description: Frozen corpus promoting named-workset, sparse-slice, and policy-limited-view scope truth to beta on the AI composer / context-inspector surface. Each case proves the AI surface only draws context from the active named workset/scope, labels out-of-scope and policy-limited context explicitly (never silently dropped), and carries the same scope truth into its evidence handoff and spend receipt. scope_class_vocabulary_map pins the mapping between the AI scope-class tokens and the aureline-workspace ScopeClass vocabulary; the AI surface reuses the workspace vocabulary verbatim, so the map is the identity over the shared classes and ai_only_scope_classes is empty. workspace_scope_class_vocabulary mirrors aureline-workspace ScopeClass::as_str(); ci/check_beta_ai_workset_scope.py re-derives it from crate source and fails closed if either drifts.
